sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data STRING, type_info STRING);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, udt_instance_of(new SER_UDT()));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (4, 'another_sample', udt_instance_of(new SER_UDT_SUB()));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE type_info = udt_instance_of('SER_UDT');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE type_info IS NULL;
SELECT udt_instance_of('SER_UDT_SUB', udt_instance_of('SER_UDT')) AS type_check FROM test_table;
SELECT bif:exec('SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE ''%sample%''');
SELECT bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL GROUP BY type_info HAVING udt_instance_of(type_info) = ''SER_UDT''');
SELECT bif:exec('SELECT data FROM (SELECT data, udt_instance_of(data) AS type_check FROM test_table) AS sub WHERE type_check IS NOT NULL ORDER BY type_check DESC');
SELECT bif:exec('SELECT AVG(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table) AS derived_table HAVING COUNT(data) > 0');
